details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) all present. reports/audit/ exists but reports/board/ is missing.

governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ present with report_output_contract.md and report_retention_policy.md. .cursor/automations/ present with README.md and spec files. reports/audit/ present.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active Python files (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference Moltbot/Clawdbot in code. Excluded: reports/audit/, reports/daily/ evidence, docs/ (document removal only), scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py and scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py (governance tooling).
